utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the final format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified per the format with all details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan provides separate costs for physical (€100/month) and mental (€65/month). This is fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan gives a single cost (€60/month) and description; acceptable as costs provided. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan provides cost (€50/month). Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists concierge €50/month. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly figures (core_premium €375/month, overall_budget €985/month). It does not provide annual breakdown explicitly, but the item asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; since annual is missing, this may be considered incomplete. Therefore, 4 items are fully specified and 1 is missing a required detail (annual breakdown).

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three named plans from the ground-truth catalogs: LifeFirst Standard Plan for health (physical and mental), LifeFirst Standard Coverage for property (home content), and LifeFirst Standard Travel Insurance which corresponds to LifeFirst Standard Plan under travel insurance. Using the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) has rating 8; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) has rating 8; LifeFirst Standard Coverage (home content) has rating 8; LifeFirst Standard Plan under travel insurance has rating 7. The additional concierge service and total budget items are not in the ground-truth rating lists, so they are not mapped.
